# Intermediate Inspection and Concealed Work Records: Documenting Installation Quality at Each Stage Before Cover-Up

## 适用受众
Site_Supervisor

## 写作角度说明
中间验收与隐蔽工程记录是现场主管确保安装质量可追溯的关键工作。电气导管穿线前、管道保温前、墙体封闭前等隐蔽阶段必须进行检查和记录，否则一旦封闭就无法验证质量。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Installing ceiling panels over conduit and pipe supports without a pre-cover inspection — relying on as-built drawings alone — creates a condition where future maintenance cannot locate or safely access concealed components.

## 参考素材
- Pre-cover inspection stages: electrical conduit before cable pulling → pipe support structures before insulation → anchor grout before floor topping → wall penetrations before sealing → ceiling grid before panel installation
- Inspection documentation: photo documentation minimum 4 photos per inspection point (overview, detail, before/after sealing material application), GPS timestamp on all photos
- Inspection sign-off: installation supervisor + client representative (or third-party inspector) both sign pre-cover inspection record before covering
- Record storage: all pre-cover inspection records linked to specific location (zone, equipment, coordinate), stored in project document management system
- Uncover protocol: if work is covered without inspection, the responsible trade must uncover for inspection at their own cost, no exceptions

## 关键词
Pre-Cover Inspection, Concealed Work, Quality Documentation, Hidden Construction, Inspection Sign-Off, As-Built Records
